_comment: DECLARATIVE ONLY — NOT a runtime enforcement site. Nothing reads this file: arena/run.mjs never loads it and the agent CLIs run with --dangerously-skip-permissions/--yolo, so allow/deny are DOCUMENTATION of intent, not a gate. In particular deny:["spend"] enforces nothing on its own. Real spend safety = token-absence (no spend credential in the agent env) + the Spend Cage (arena/spend-requests/README.md, SETUP.md Phase 5). This file remains the thing an agent edits (by PR) to REQUEST more; the merge is the door.
